title: stelis discrepans
intro: Stelis discrepans, also known as the "False Tillandsia," is a species of epiphytic orchid native to Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis discrepans are said to include the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as the relief of skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of Stelis discrepans include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the affected area.
